title: Duck Mod
description: Adds a client-sided, toggleable duck to your game to follow you around, with an optional server-side component.
body:
> Note: This mod is archived as all of the features are now available with [PetsMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/pets-mod), an updated and upgraded version of DuckMod with more features.


![Duck Mod's Banner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6abf2f39d37fc3b5eac5cac850f39945e2f7c497_0.webp)

Duck Mod requires Cloth Config API and Fabric API.
# The Client
When installed on the client, this mod will enable your new best friend, a custom duck! This duck will follow you around wherever you go, and is customizeable with different skins. It will work on any server, and is toggleable with /duck ```on/off```. 

Beware, your duck may occasionally quack to get your attention!

<details>
<summary>List of Useful Commands</summary>
  
- /duck <on/off>
  
      toggles the duck on or off.
  
- /duckname <name>

      sets the duck's custom name to whatever you specified.

- /resetduckname 

      resets the duck's name.

- /teleportduck

      teleports the duck to you, in case it gets suck
      note: animalsl can only teleport if their owner is on the ground. this includes the duck.

- /duckspecies <mallard/pekin>

      changes the species of the duck. by default, the duck is a mallard.


</details>

# The Server

When installed on the server, this mod adds ducks to the game that will spawn naturally. They spawn in:

- Plains
- Cherry Blossom Forests
- Beaches
- Forests
- Dark Forests
- Jungles

They spawn in groups of one to seven, of different species which are random and will not change depending on whether you have /duckspecies set to mallard or pekin. You can tame them with seeds, similar to a chicken.

# Future Plans

Even if this mod doesn't go anywhere, this is definitely my favorite mod that I have created and will definitely be getting updated soon. We hope to:

- Be able to toggle off quacking
- Add NEW duck skins, such as female mallards or wood ducks.
- Be able to interact with the duck in different ways.

We will be adding more pets to your game soon - so make sure to look out for those!

# FAQ

**Q: Why isn't this mod on the latest version?**
A: This mod only supports a few versions for now, however it will be updated consistantly - if a new update comes out, just hit that heart to get notified when it updates and I will get it ported to the latest version in a couple of days!

**Q: Why isn't this mod on my favorite version?**
A: Right now, we only support a couple of versions. However, I am taking version requests - please open an issue on my Github and I'll get right on it?

**Q: Is Neoforge/Forge support ever coming?**
A: Short answer: unfortunately not. However, if you are on neoforge, please consider using [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) with the [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) and the Neoforge version of [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium?loader=neoforge).

(Unfortunately, as of writing it doesn't look like connector is on modern, but this may change in the future, so keep it in the back of your mind!)

**Q: What's next for the Pets team?**
A: I don't want to reveal too much, but lets just say its a bit of a icy plan right now!
